title: EnchantWithMob
description: add Enchanter and Mob enchant From Minecraft Dungeons
body:
# Enchant With Mob

![Enchanter With Enchanted Mob](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/SwDIbBHh/images/24f500691000692554ca0a431cc63f12d1310f6c.png)
 
Forge version requires Bagus Lib for 9.4.0 and above!

This mod adds the Enchanter from Minecraft Dungeons. Enchanted Mobs bring new difficulty to fights...

Discuss my mods here on discord!

https://discord.gg/eGeE49BEUH

## Features:

Adds the Enchanter from Minecraft Dungeons. This mob can "Enchant" other hostile mobs to make them more powerful. When killed it may drop a mob enchanting book for the player to use! Enchanters will also join village raids.

Hostile mobs may spawn pre-enchanted based on the difficulty. This can be changed using the config file. Ancient mobs from Minecraft Dungeons can also be found!

Many configurable options for modpack developers. In version 1.21.1 and above, datapacks can change mob enchantments. Epic Fight's armor rendering is supported natively, as are the raids from Faction Craft.

## Customize with Datapack

You can customizable EnchantWithMob visual with Datapack!

https://github.com/baguchi/EnchantWithMob-Forge/wiki/Customizable-Glow-Eye-Texture-For-Enchanted
 

## Credit:

Edmord - texture artist 

Evo - documented the CF page  

BaguChan - Active Coder  

TruffleHistorian - glowing enchanted eye texture making  

Infamous Misadventures Teams - they made EnchantWithMob home!  

and Bumble bee zone Original work based on MobEnchant's beam - https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/the-bumblezone-forge

Warning: backport and fabric port not planned and do not ask port
